title: Fireman, Save My Child!
writer: Ray Enright, Robert Lord, Arthur Caesar
actors: Joe E. Brown, Evalyn Knapp, Lilian Bond
plot: Joe Grant is an inventor, fireman and baseball player in his small home town. He gets an offer to play in a big team, he hopes to get more money for his inventions. But he is invited to present his invention to a fire-extinguisher...
